response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise and leadership in software development, with notable experience at top-tier tech companies like Google and Meta. His contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source projects align well with the AI strategy focus of the role. However, his experience lacks explicit depth in cloud/AI product leadership at a strategic level, and his entrepreneurial background is more individual than organizational.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, including roles at Google and Meta.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators) and open-source projects with real-world adoption (e.g., GISCollective).
Strong technical leadership evidenced by workshops, talks, and mentorship (e.g., Selenium courses, Refactoring Dojos).
concerns: Lacks explicit experience in *strategic* AI/cloud product leadership or advising enterprise customers on AI adoption.
Entrepreneurial experience is primarily individual (open-source projects) rather than within larger organizations.
No advanced degree in AI/ML or demonstrated expertise in building AI-powered platforms at scale.
